name: construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month tool
description: For construction contractors processing 5–15 bids/month, inefficient bid submission causes missed project opportunities. We streamline the bid submission process instead of manual bid submission via email and spreadsheets.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual bid submission via email and spreadsheets
